description: I was able to produce a decent article this morning in about 10 minutes. I won't say the output from Texta is cut-and-paste-able but it is not bad and you could possibly get away with doing that (though not recommended). Overall Texta is as good as it gets for our purposes.

pros: Texta gets you content. That's it's job! We take that content and then edit. Don't expect to use any AI output without edits. But you will definitely produce more good quality content if your using something like Texta to help you.
cons: So far, we're happy with how it's working! The only thing we wish we could do is constrain the content subject matter more to our liking. Perhaps we are not feeding the engine with the right information. This is not a complaint about Texta though... it's a general AI complaint.

pros: Pros: Writing is hard, right? With Texta.ai, you're free to write in your own voice, not someone else's. Texta.ai uses sophisticated natural language technology and state-of-the-art algorithms to create content in a snap. Write long form or short form. It's multilingual and the content is plagiarism free! Use Texta.ai to automate your writing tasks and give your brain a break today
cons: Cons: Not having enough time to use Texta.ai all day We've all had to deal with writer's block and the hassle of hiring a writer, but what if you could create perfectly-written content for anything, in just a few seconds, at a fraction of the cost? Stop worrying about having to hire writers, and start using Texta.ai. It's an unfair advantage that'll help you grow your business like never before!
